description:
Suspend games and applications

Similar to the incredibly useful sleep/suspend function found in consoles like the Nintendo Switch and Sony PlayStation; suspend your game (and its resource usage) at any time, and resume whenever you wish - at the push of a button.
Bug Fixes
- use latest SDKs when building on Windows #262
- windows: don't crash on Windows with Flutter 3.44+ #262
- Fix hotkey labels on Windows #262
- init tray before async work #262
- don't try to get release notes if we don't know the running version #262
- windows: set tray tooltip to prevent random characters showing #262
Tests
- skip tests on Windows that aren't supported there #262
